milestones.title: Started studying computer science
milestones.summary: Began formal training in software engineering and product development.
details: Focused on programming fundamentals and human-centered design.
Built early web applications and collaborative projects.

milestones.title: Began first full-time engineering role
milestones.summary: Transitioned from student projects into professional product engineering.
details: Worked across frontend and backend systems.
Learned production delivery, cross-functional collaboration, and reliability practices.

milestones.title: Delivered major cross-functional initiatives
milestones.summary: Took on broader ownership across product direction, system quality, and team execution.
details: Drove planning, implementation, and rollout for impactful launches.
Improved the team's process, visibility, and delivery confidence.
